basic_details.job_title: ESIC Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 15 Specialist and Senior Resident Posts
basic_details.short_information: Employees' State Insurance Corporation Hospital Kota (ESIC Hospital Kota) Specialist and Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on the official website. A total of 15 vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Specialist and Senior Resident Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 69 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: DM/PG/DNB/Diploma in concerned Specialty from recognized university, registered in MCI or State Medical Council
qualification.details: Specialist Posts: DM/PG/DNB/Diploma in the requisite Specialty from a recognized university, registered with the MCI or State Medical Council, with 3 years of experience for PG/DNB or 5 years for Diploma. Senior Resident Posts: DM/PG/DNB/Diploma in the concerned Specialty from a recognized university, registered with the MCI or State Medical Council.

salary_details.details: Specialist (Full Time): ₹1,21,408/- (Fixed) per month Specialist (Part Time): ₹60,000 + ₹15,000 per month Senior Resident: As per 7th CPC Level 11
